name: pcs-scraper
description: Scrape PCS data and insert into Supabase

scripts.scrape:daily:all: npm run scrape:pcs:schedule && node scraper-update-riders.js && node scraper-update-results-current-year.js && node scraper-update-stage-profiles.js && node scraper-update-uci-points.js && node scripts/backfill-stage-breakaways.js --only-missing
